summary: Successfully coordinated supporting cast development. Dispatched supporting-cast-developer which created 12 supporting character profiles (CHAR-003 through CHAR-014) covering all major factions: High Conclave (Thalen Reyvas antagonist, Vairen Ethis mentor, Iryse Caleth tragic figure, Daerin Morweth pragmatist), Cerith Court (Kethran Var operative handler, Serath Vyn legal absolutist), Ashborne Legion (Sethis Varn commander, Erys Kael survivor), Archival Order (Sendra Corith researcher), Rivenmarch freeholders (Tessen Vael guide, Marin Savel herbalist), and provincial garrison (Tavik Soren commander). Then dispatched character-voice-designer which enhanced all 12 voices with 10-dimensional fingerprints, unique dialoguePatterns sections, and non-overlapping metaphor domains. Index.json updated with 14 total characters, 20 relationship web entries, and a supportingVoiceDistinctionGuide. All character files pass schema validation.

routingDecisions.outcome: completed — all 12 voices enhanced and differentiated

factionsCovered: High Conclave (4 characters: CHAR-003, CHAR-004, CHAR-013, CHAR-014)
